events.Name: Mental health day
events.Desc: Mental health day in the belfast campus. There will be several stalls and speakers in the BC building foyer for the students that are would like to learn more about mental health.

events.Name: Tea and coffee
events.Desc: Free tea and coffee. there will be a selection of refreshments including hot drinks and food, all students are welcome.

events.Name: University open day
events.Desc: A university open day for all students who would like to learn more about our university, students can arrive from anytime between 17:00 - 19:00 and are welcome to explore the campus with a tour or at their own leisure.

events.Name: Careers day for engineering students
events.Desc: A careers day for the engineering students, several top companies will be in to give students an oppurtunity to see what their career propspects are for the future

events.Name: University football match
events.Desc: A friendly student football match between two teams of our physical education students, all students are welcome to watch the match
